mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch_invoice_item (task_id, invoice_id, customer_id, contract_id, repayment_record_id, item_data, status, error_message) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{invoiceId}, #{customerId}, #{contractId}, #{repaymentRecordId}, #{itemData}, #{status}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_invoice_item SET invoice_id = #{invoiceId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, contract_id = #{contractId}, repayment_record_id = #{repaymentRecordId}, item_data = #{itemData}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id}
